name: Potato Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add raisins, nuts, and grated potato to the dry mixture.
3. Stir in the sour milk and salad oil until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
6. Optionally, glaze with your favorite glaze before serving.
